title: Domestic Violence Support Groups * LGBTQ2+ Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Domestic Violence Support Groups * LGBTQ2+ Issues 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter African American Community Hispanic/Latino Community LGBTQ2+ Issues Mothers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF BRADLEY ANGLE MARTHA'S FOLX Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers confidential services such as support groups, resource referrals, safety planning, shelter and housing assistance, and basic needs assistance. Also offers related classes and workshops. Eligibility: Self-identified LGBTQ2+ folks of all genders who have experienced or are experiencing intimate partner violence Hours: Monday-Friday 10am-4pm; by appointment only Email (503) 232-1528 305 Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
